holdings.infoBox: PRF is an equity ETF with a total of 1004 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.31%, Apple at 4.30%, Intel at 3.14%, Amazon.com at 2.04%, and Microsoft at 2.01%.

overview.description: The Invesco RAFI US 1000 ETF (PRF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the RAFI Fundamental Select US 1000 index. The fund tracks an index of 1,000 of the largest US companies that are selected and weighted using fundamental metrics. PRF was launched on Dec 19, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
